title: Minecraft but You Teleport Every 45 Seconds
description: A chaos datapack that teleports you to a completely random location every 45 seconds — anywhere, any time.
body:
This datapack adds a simple but insanely chaotic twist to Minecraft:  
 Every 45 seconds, you are teleported to a random location.

It could be deep in a cave, high in the sky, inside a lava lake, in an ocean monument, or right next to a creeper. You never know what’s coming — that’s the fun.

### ✨ Features

Forces a random teleport every 45 seconds

Works anywhere in the world (nether/end optional if you enable it)

Smooth performance — no lag spikes

Great for YouTube challenge content

Supports singleplayer + multiplayer

### 📦 How to Install

Put the datapack into your world’s datapacks folder

Run /reload
